summary: On 2022-03-07, there was a statistically anomalous spike in adverse event reports for hydrochlorothiazide, with 60 reports received compared to an expected 32.74 based on Holt-Winters forecasting.
notable_pattern: Reports from 2022-03-04 show a mix of serious and non-serious events, including hospitalizations and a death, with patients taking various combinations of medications, including other diuretics and antihypertensives.
confidence_caveat: This signal is based on a limited sample of 8 reports and should be further investigated before any conclusions can be drawn.
